features: Package Includes:You will receive 3 extra large christmas gift sacks (56 × 36 inch), 3 gift tags, and 3 red strings. Complete set makes your gift wrapping simple and quick, perfect for large presents without the hassle of paper and tape.

Extra Large Capacity:These giant christmas gift bags are spacious enough to hold oversized presents such as stuffed animals, bedding, or multiple gift sets. Ideal for family celebrations, school parties, or office events, ensuring your gifts stay organized and festive.

Premium Material:Made from long-lasting PE material, these extra large santa sacks are strong, reusable, and tear-resistant. Vibrant colors and fine printing give them a high-quality look while ensuring your gifts remain safe during transport or storage.

Practical Design:Each big christmas bag comes with a drawstring closure and matching card, making it easy to secure gifts and add personal notes. Say goodbye to messy wrapping paper—these christmas gift sacks save time and add elegance.

Wide Application:Perfect for Christmas trees, parties, and gift exchanges, these giant santa sacks are also suitable for birthdays, weddings, and festive occasions. Place them under the tree or use them as seasonal decorations to create a joyful holiday atmosphere.
